summary: Completed frontend-focused verification of enterprise landing/app-shell split and route continuity. All requested landing, navigation, and app route behaviors passed. Build and contracts status checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated / is dedicated enterprise marketing page (no app shell/wallet), Launch App routes to /discover, app shell + wallet appear on /discover, and /discover /portfolio /create /agent all load. yarn build passed. /api/contracts/status returned ready=true.
rca of the issue: Initial Playwright run failed due incorrect test selector assumptions (looked for wallet-connect-button and non-existent route testids). Re-ran with actual data-testid values from code (connect-wallet-button, portfolio-page, create-page-grid, agent-monitor-grid); all checks passed.
mocked_api: MOCKED: Landing page marketing/product content is static copy; underlying app data remains seeded wrappers as previously noted.
